title: Intensely Briny Spanish Beans Fabada Asturiana
description: A briny and tender Spanish dish featuring red curry paste and coconut cream, perfect for a midnight craving. This diabetic-friendly version is made with careful ingredient selection.
instructions: Heat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large ceramic tagine, combine the soaked and drained navy beans, red curry paste, coconut cream, smoked paprika, garlic, onion, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to combine, then cover the tagine with a lid.
Transfer the tagine to the preheated oven and bake for 2 hours.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the beans hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 5 days.
Reheat the beans gently over low heat, adding a little water if needed to achieve the desired consistency.
